nav.backTo: Back to AI Solutions Demo Hub

hero.title: AI Solutions Demo Hub
hero.subtitle: Purpose-built demos for analytics, ecommerce, and research workflows. Test real business scenarios powered by multi-model AI systems.

home.supportMessage: The right model for the right task — routed automatically for business use cases.

demos.sectionDescription: Click into any demo to see what it does and try it with sample data. No sign-up required.

dataAnalyst.title: AI Data Analyst
dataAnalyst.description: Turn raw CSV data into trends, KPI snapshots, and actionable business insights.

ecommerce.title: AI Ecommerce Analyst
ecommerce.description: Analyze store performance, product trends, and revenue signals with AI-generated recommendations.

researchAgent.title: AI Research Agent
researchAgent.description: Synthesize complex topics into structured findings and decision-ready reports.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: From your data to business insights in three steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Bring in your CSV, ecommerce export, or research topic.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Multi-model AI processes and analyzes your inputs.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Get summaries, trends, and recommended actions.

footer.title: Powered by multi-model AI
footer.description: This platform dynamically routes tasks to the most suitable AI models (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini) depending on the workflow.

analyst.title: AI Data Analyst
analyst.subtitle: Upload a CSV or use sample data. Get an executive summary, KPI snapshot, trend analysis, and suggested actions.
analyst.uploadHint: CSV with columns: date, order_id, product, category, price, quantity, revenue, customer, country, channel.
analyst.askQuestion: Ask a question about your data…

ecommerce.title: AI Ecommerce Analyst
ecommerce.subtitle: See revenue and product performance at a glance, then ask questions in plain language. Upload your data or use sample data.
ecommerce.askPlaceholder: e.g. What's driving revenue? Which products should we promote?

research.title: AI Research Agent
research.subtitle: Enter a topic and depth. Get a topic summary, key findings, comparison view, and a final report.
